title: nephelium costatum
intro: Nephelium costatum, also known as the rambai, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of Nephelium costatum include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help in reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
